title: Umami Silky Festive Allspice Stir-fry
description: This low-carb-friendly festive dish features a savory marinade of ground allspice and umami-rich ingredients to create a silky texture in your favorite stir-fry.
instructions: Marinate water chestnuts and green onions in a mixture of allspice, ginger paste, soy sauce, and lime juice for at least 30 minutes.
Heat sesame oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add finely chopped bell peppers and stir-fry until tender-crisp.
Remove marinated water chestnuts and green onions from the marinade, then add to the wok with the peppers. Stir-fry for another minute.
Stir in the remaining marinade and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until well combined.
Garnish with extra sesame seeds if desired.
